name: hono-package-registry
description: JSR-compatible package registry backed by git or local directory

git-url.description: Remote git repository URL (required for git store)

base-dir.description: Local filesystem directory for local store

passthrough.description: Pass through to jsr.io when package not found locally

fallback-version.description: Fallback version when no real version found

log-level.description: Minimum log level (debug, info, warn, error)
